parsed_review.summary: CP00-871 is a descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace pack bridging the P09 permission/audit review-receipt tail (RP28.P09.M05.S21-S22) into the synthetic fixture-set head (RP28.P09.M06.S01-S08); it does not claim production_ready=true, runtime_ready, or enterprise trust. Verified by direct source inspection (Read/Grep/Glob): (1) MARKETPLACE_CP871_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:496) carries correct upstream CP00-870, next CP00-872 / RP28.P09.M06.S09, and a descriptor-only production_ready_flag; (2) deliverable distribution {hermes_evidence:1, implementation:3, claude_review:2, security_audit:2, test:1, ui:1}, phase/micro counts (RP28.P09:10; M05:2, M06:8), and unit titles all match the manifest, requirements, and the CLAUDE_REVIEW_ROWS slices that drive validateMarketplaceCp871ClaudeReviewFixtureTransitionCoverage; (3) validateMarketplaceCp871ClaudeReviewFixtureTransitionDescriptor (validators.js:3277) and MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION hard-reject runtime execution, app submission/install, permission-decision/audit-event/product-state writes, connector secrets, OAuth tokens, prompt/completion payloads, and real client data; the contract JSON latest_pack/latest_projection/no_write_attestation agree; (4) authority boundary holds everywhere - Claude read_only, claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human final approval required for runtime opening at CP00-872; Hermes packet is control-plane only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false), not embedded in product runtime; (5) model.test.js:1017-1050 cover binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor, and contract projection currency; (6) CP178+ hardening satisfied - auth preflight passed, prompt 2470B<25600B with no embedded source/diff, read-only tools only, review schema present, summary-only correctly disallowed. Provenance: command-evidence.json shows the 3-command pre-review local matrix at exit 0 (agent-reported; not re-run under read-only role), with the full deterministic suite running post-review per the established CP870 pattern; pending adjudication/inspection/claude-review-result are expected pre-review placeholders. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, etc.) are correctly excluded by changed-file-scope and not attributed to this pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; PASS. The receipt does not confer final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains an external boundary outside this CP closeout goal.
